meaning: n.鍔ㄧ墿鎴栦汉,鍔ㄧ墿鎴栦汉鏈夌殑鐗硅川
examples: WE DENY that human language is so limited by our creatureliness that it is rendered inadequate as a vehicle for divine revelation.
Those who are poor in spirit recognize their creatureliness and their sinfulness-but more, they are ready to confess their SINS and renounce them.
